campaigns.name: Planning Analytics — New Whitespace Florida
campaigns.tagline: Move from reactive planning to proactive, insight-driven decision-making.
value_props: Run unlimited what-if scenarios in real time
Empower business users to forecast without data science expertise
Interact with planning data using natural language
AI agents monitor, analyze, and recommend actions continuously
Reduce manual effort through AI-driven automation
sequence: Day 1 — AI Forecasting: Highly accurate forecasts using advanced ML. Instantly update financial models as conditions change.
Day 5 — Generative AI Planning: Ask questions, get instant insights. Auto-generate reports and planning inputs in plain language.
Day 10 — Agentic AI: Move beyond insights. AI agents automate workflows, trigger alerts, enable closed-loop planning.
Day 15 — Close: Improve forecast accuracy, increase planning participation, make faster data-driven decisions.

campaigns.name: Planning Analytics — Expansion (Existing IBM)
campaigns.tagline: Your team is already on Planning Analytics — here's what AI unlocks next.
value_props: Adaptive learning continuously improves forecast accuracy
Incorporate internal and external drivers automatically
Broader planning participation across finance, ops, and business teams
Conversational AI simplifies complex analysis for all users
Closed-loop planning with ongoing AI optimization
sequence: Day 1 — Upgrade angle: New AI capabilities your team isn't using yet. What-if scenarios + adaptive learning in real time.
Day 5 — Gen AI Planning: Natural language planning — ask questions, auto-generate narratives. Broader team participation.
Day 10 — Agentic AI: AI agents that monitor and act. Automate repetitive workflows, proactive alerts, closed-loop optimization.
